nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: Aethopyga
nodes.summary: Aethopyga（Aethopyga）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联20种鸟类，如黑胸太阳鸟、蓝喉太阳鸟、Lovely sunbird等20种鸟类。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: White-flanked sunbird
nodes.summary: White-flanked sunbird（Aethopyga eximia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-flanked sunbird。

nodes.name: White-flanked sunbird
nodes.summary: The white-flanked sunbird (Aethopyga eximia) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is endemic to Indonesia. Taxonomy The white-flanked sunbird was formally described by Thomas Horsfield in 1821. Distribution and habitat Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
nodes.shortSummary: The white-flanked sunbird (Aethopyga eximia) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is endemic to Indonesia.

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
